title: Legacized
description: A modpack focused around Legacy4j to bring back almost everything from LCE(Legacy Console Edition), plus adding some few things!
body:
## 🕹️ Legacized; Legacy Console Edition brought back; to Java Edition!

✨ This modpack uses Legacy4j and other addons to bring back the feel of classic console gameplay, with all the features, textures, and interfaces you remember.

![A picture of the title screen from this modpack](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/852a882fd5f8113c606a2611b1c7436c1d59819b_0.webp)

🌟 Features Included:
- 👫 Multiplayer System – Join your friends with e4mc!
- 🎮 Minigames – Battle your way through the classic minigames! The mod Minimega attempts to bring these games back. You will need a Discord account to join their Discord server to start playing Online. You can play Offline without it, however. (Not all minigames are implemented; minigames are developed by Minimega's developers)
- 🏡 Legacy Worlds – Play in the Tutorial World, Festive World, Super Mario, and more coming soon!
- 🎨 Classic GUI – Just like the original, with most of the menus, textures, and interfaces!
- 🎭 Texture Packs and Skin Selection – Most of the old packs now available, again!
- ...and more!
- 
![A view from the Tutorial World using the Minecraft Classic Texture Pack](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b01b49a08f9fdd192f005e3c5a3f4e2cf137d2fb_0.webp)

🔹 Experience the gameplay just as you remember it!This  modpack is your portal to the legacy version of Minecraft Console Edition.

💾 Download now and bring the legacy back to life!

### DO NOT USE THIS MODPACK ON SERVERS WITH ANTI-CHEAT! WE AM NOT RESPONISBLE FOR YOUR BAN. You have been warned

Most of the modpack is powered with Legacy4j. This mod provides most of the features provided in the mod. To access options of the mod, click Modification List, find and double click Legacy4j.

When updating the modpack, your options for Minecraft and Legacy4j may be reset. We apologize in advanced.

Credits:
- UI Aspects, for some lang replacement
- Lasting Legacy's Legacy Modpack Resources for the intro screen.

### *THIS MODPACK IS NOT AN OFFICIAL PRODUCT OF MOJANG STUDIOS, MICROSOFT, OR 4J STUDIOS*
